name: Send SMS appointment reminder for free with Google Calendar and RCSZilla

parameters.content:
## Workflow overview

Build a consent-based appointment reminder SMS service from Google Calendar.

n8n checks tomorrow's appointments, reads the customer phone number and SMS consent from each event, then queues the message through RCSZilla.

RCSZilla lets your connected Android device act as the SMS/RCS gateway. The workflow is free to run, but your carrier plan may still apply SMS costs.

## Setup guide

1. Install the community node: n8n-nodes-rcszilla.
2. Add Google Calendar and RCSZilla credentials.
3. Connect the Android phone that will send SMS messages. RCSZilla setup docs: https://docs.rcszilla.com/?page=get_started
4. Choose the Google Calendar that stores appointments.
5. Add appointment metadata to each event description:

Name: Maria
Phone: +40700000000
SMS consent: yes

6. Test with one internal event before activating.

Only send reminders to customers who gave SMS consent.

## Calendar event format

The parser reads the event title, description, date/time, and location.

Required in the description:

Phone: +40700000000
SMS consent: yes

Optional:

Name: Maria

The SMS includes the appointment title, date/time, location when available, and an opt-out line.

## 1. Daily trigger

Starts the workflow every day at 09:00.

Change this time if your customers should receive reminders earlier or later in the day.

## 2. Read appointments

Gets tomorrow's Google Calendar events from the selected calendar.

The node only returns the fields this workflow needs: id, title, description, start/end time, and location.

## 3. Prepare reminder

Parses the event text for Phone, Name, and SMS consent.

It normalizes the phone number, builds the reminder text, adds the opt-out line, and marks the item as eligible only when consent is present.

## 4. Consent gate

Checks whether the event has a usable phone number and positive SMS consent.

Eligible reminders go to RCSZilla. Missing or opted-out records go to the skipped summary.

## 5. Queue SMS

Queues the reminder with RCSZilla using the SMS channel.

RCSZilla sends from your connected Android device, which acts as the phone-based SMS gateway for this free reminder workflow.

## Skipped reminders

Use this output while testing.

If a reminder is skipped, update the Google Calendar event description with a valid phone number and SMS consent, or leave it skipped when the customer has not opted in.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: 'skipped', reason: $json.skipReason, eventId: $json.eventId, service: $json.service } }];
